summary: Adds empty-string input validation guards for MiddlewareSpec.Name in RenderPastePipeline and PluginSpec.ConfigSection in RenderPluginConfig, with corresponding table-driven error-path tests. All tests pass with 100% statement coverage, go vet clean, golangci-lint clean.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (empty name, empty ConfigSection)
Error paths tested with specific assertion on error message content
Tests follow Gomega dot-import + NewGomegaWithT(t) convention

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing error-return pattern (duplicate guards) in same file
Validation placed at earliest point before use of the field
Error messages include context (pipeline name, plugin name)
SPDX license header and Feature: CC-0004 present

security_checklist.item: No user-facing input (pure library functions, no external I/O)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is minimal — two guard clauses, no over-engineering
No Kubernetes API calls (pure functions only)
Consistent with existing duplicate-detection pattern in same file

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty name detected before pipeline construction
Empty ConfigSection detected before map insertion

defensive_checklist.item: Empty-string edge case now returns explicit error instead of producing malformed output

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
